catalog_row.Paper: ToTEM: The Bank of Canada's New Canadian Projection Model
catalog_row.ModelType: Open-economy DSGE projection model; linearized/log-linearized implementation
catalog_row.KeyFeatures: Multiple finished-product sectors; commodity-producing sector; sticky prices; sticky wages; sticky import prices; NFA/risk-premium exchange-rate block; fiscal rules

status_row.paper_title: ToTEM: The Bank of Canada's New Canadian Projection Model

status_row.notes: Source is an overview article without a formal mathematical appendix in MinerU Markdown; implementation file used only as cross-check.

validation.details: English and Chinese each contain 71 F-number references, including body and table references.

unresolved_issues: Primary Markdown is narrative and does not print exact ToTEM equilibrium equations.
Exact nested CES production functions by sector need source-level review.
Exact household utility/budget split needs source-level review.
Exact Calvo wage/price recursions need source-level review.
Exact steady-state system needs source-level review.
No Dynare runtime validation was performed.
